use_cases: Displaying social media or portfolio links in a space-efficient stacked format
Showcasing article previews with expandable details on click
Creating interactive link collections for personal profiles or portfolios
Organizing multiple content items with smooth expand/collapse animations
ai_summary: Stacked article cards component with smooth expand-on-click transitions. Features multiple article items with images, titles, and subtitles that stack vertically and reveal more content upon interaction. Built with Tailwind CSS for clean, modern styling suitable for portfolios, media sites, or link collections.
